name: X-Golf Ann Arbor
address: 333 N Maple Rd, Ann Arbor, MI 48103
about: X-Golf Ann Arbor is an indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators designed for accuracy and realism. The venue offers a complete experience, including on-site dining, a full bar, and professional coaching services. Patrons can play on virtual courses, train with a PGA professional, host private events, or participate in leagues and tournaments. The space accommodates groups of all sizes, from solo players to large corporate outings, with amenities like a private simulator room and free Wi-Fi. Operating hours are extensive, with late-night options on weekends, though times are subject to reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled simulator accuracy using camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Comprehensive amenities including a full bar, food menu, and private event spaces
Professional coaching with PGA-certified instructor John Murray available for lessons
Flexible booking for both casual play and organized leagues and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available including shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rental is available, and you can use your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food or drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full menu with food and beverages for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for an individual to play 18 holes. For multiple players, add 1 hour per person to the total time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Ann Arbor welcomes children of all ages and is suitable for families.
